3D游戏

    • Secret Flasher Manaka
    • Secret Flasher Sereka
    • Succubus Cafe
  • 3D建模
    • Friends Game
    • The Secret Atelier

杂谈

PS
  • 以上所有游戏都是落谦入坑七八年来游玩过的，有些已经跑过ai了，但是没有修正人名与专有名词，以及renpy无法提取并且还未翻译的文本，再加上写博文，上传文件，这一套丝滑小连招，坐在电脑面前没个一坤时（两个半小时）搞不定。
  • 因为落谦不是为爱发电，不是为爱发电，不是为爱发电，重要的事情说三遍，自己只是抽出空余时间，写博文上传到博客而已，一天才24个小时，除去吃喝拉撒睡，还剩下多少？自己算吧，所以还请各位水友见谅。
  • 如果你非常非常非常急，我可以建议你去那些对应游戏的QQ交流群，一般只需要回答几个问题，就能进去，那里聚集很多大佬，不仅提供大陆网盘，而且翻译质量极高，文笔堪比网文的，能者居上的存在，并且是为爱发电的，有的可能需要充电才能进群，这个我也不太清楚，毕竟是在音符直播和水友聊天时了解到的。
  • 另外落谦的翻译在大陆的HS2视觉小说圈子中，是出了名的烂，那为什么还要分享出来？因为是分享给一些和落谦一样入坑很久的水友，都是在音符直播聊天的，来来去去就那几个人，弱水三千，只取一瓢，总会有人需要的，某天不需要的时候，也就是博客停更之时。
  • 各位水友也可以投稿某些自己认为比较OK的游戏到博文更新计划中，落谦会根据这游戏在外网的评分进行考虑，比如在f95上有4颗星评分的游戏，这种基本达到精品质量了，也有些量大管饱的老游戏，这类作品一般在3.7-4.2左右，处于见仁见智的位置，比如《魔法学院》《徐娘半老》《欲望理论》等等，都可以在博文底下登录GitHub进行留言，也可以通过telegram联系落谦。
  • 当然，如果有水友需要落谦跑某个renpy引擎游戏的ai，你也可以注册硅基流动，通过落谦这个链接注册，双方都会获得2000万tokens（2000w可以完完整整跑一个《老婆学院》的翻译），提供你的API密钥，让落谦去跑ai。

碎碎念

关于异世界天堂的翻译

  • 待

关于2024年的AI翻译赞助群

  • 待

关于博客

  • 待

item.title: Imperial Chronicles 帝国编年史
item.description:
Imperial Chronicles [v0.13] [Lazy Monkey]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The young prince has been in exile since childhood. Unexpectedly, he gets the opportunity to return to his home. But there will be many dangers on his way, because the closer you are to the crown, the more rivals and enemies you have.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.13
  • 发行日期：2026-03-31

Changelog

更新日志
  • 4 Main story events
  • 500 renders + 10 animations

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Subscribestar
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 我复活了，这次添加了个英文的简体中文，非常，十分推荐你玩这个，不要问为什么
  • 但是有些小瑕疵，就是作者改了前面一些文本，所以汉化补丁不显示中文了，因为没有对应的文本
  • 不过我俄文修了对话文本，英文没修，我找个有空时间再修吧
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.02 02:00 0.13 ：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.04.02 02:00 汉化补丁：小友境月订阅 ✅
2026.04.02 02:00 汉化补丁：添加英文AI ✅
2026.04.02 22:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod、画廊mod ✅
2026.04.02 22:00 汉化补丁：统一主要角色人名 ✅
2026.04.05 02:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-04-02
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

素图
  • 作者无itch和steam，所以自己去patreon看预览图吧。

DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁）

Win/Linux（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 俄文原版：GOFILE
  • 俄文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载俄文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒
  • 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程
  • 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电
  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

Android（安卓端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 俄文原版：GOFILE
  • 俄文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  • 主体APK：GOFILE
  • 主体APK：PIXELDRAIN
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载俄文原版、AI意译汉化补丁和主体APK
  • 安装APK文件
  • 启动游戏，放行所有权限
  • 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退
  • 然后解压俄文原版压缩包文件
  • 将俄文原版game文件夹中的所有文件及文件夹和汉化补丁rpa文件一起移动到以下路径： 
    1

    Documents/RenPy_Saves/com.luoqian.ImperialChronicles/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒
  • 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程
  • 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电
  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

iOS（苹果端）

  1. 环境配置：
  • 苹果端需使用Spark模拟器进行游玩
  • Spark模拟器AppStore有售
  1. 下载链接：
  • 俄文原版：GOFILE
  • 俄文原版：VIKINGFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱发电
  • AI意译汉化补丁：爱赞助
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载俄文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 打开Spark模拟器导入俄文原版压缩包文件，不用解压，不用解压，不用解压，重要的事情说三遍
  • 然后将汉化补丁rpa文件移动到以下路径： 
    1

    我的iPhone/Spark/games/ImperialChronicles/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒
  • 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程
  • 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电
  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

宇宙安全声明！

  • 本文章仅供学习与交流，请勿商用或非法传播
  • 落谦不对因使用本文所产生的任何问题负责

item.title: Fog of War 战争迷雾
item.description:
Fog of War [v0.5.1] [Story Machine Studios]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Rex Richards, born with an enhanced eidetic memory and a natural born soldier becomes the youngest to ever make Delta Force. Aka “The Unit”. After feeling like he is losing his humanity on the battlefield he retires. Rex uses his sciences degree he obtained while serving to attend R. Winters Medical University, where he tries to escape his clandestine operator past. Will Rex find solace on his new chosen path or become the monster he fears? Sometimes walking away does not mean you escape without a fight.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: I Was a Teenage Vampire Rebuild 我是少年吸血鬼
item.description:
I Was a Teenage Vampire Rebuild [v0.8.1b] [FatalMasterpiece]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It’s summer, 1989. Class is almost out, and your last chance to make memories is slipping away. You’ve got plans: get a job, buy a car, maybe even find a girlfriend. But something’s wrong in Silver Lake. People are disappearing. Shadows move where they shouldn’t. And when your friend goes missing, the mystery hits home. Something in the darkness is waiting for you. Something old. This summer, growing up might just get you killed.
Spoiler
  • I Was a Teenage Vampire is a story driven visual novel inspired by retro adventure games, 80s horror flicks, and teen sex comedies of the 1980s. Set in smalltown America during the final days of class, you’ll navigate friendships, romances, and the strange forces awakening beneath the surface of Silver Lake. With branching paths, player choice, and characters who remember how you treat them, your actions shape the story and its outcome. This version has been completely rebuilt in Ren’Py.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Lust in Suburbs 郊区情欲
item.description:
Lust in Suburbs [v0.17] [eggsov]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Summer. Suburbs. Nothing ever changes — until you decide to. You live with your foster family, wasting days on streams and dust. But one day, something shifts. You set three goals: Find a girl. Fix your family. Face your past. Simple, right? But soon, things start to feel… off. Familiar faces look different. Glances last longer. And everyday moments? Suddenly way too intimate.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说

item.title: Murmur 低语
item.description:
Murmur [v0.7 Hotfix] [Devil’s Dad]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It is a story about love and lust in our lives, about what their absence leads to and what forms they can take. In this game, you’ll be playing as a 29-year-old guy who gets involved in unexpected mystical events. His life gets turned on its head and he has to survive in the new world he’s found himself in. But it’s not as grim as it seems at first glance. As you play, you’ll meet girls who need you just like you need them. Will you make them yours, seduce them, or cherish and love them? It’s up to you. Each of them has their own background, character, and hidden fetishes…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.7 Public Hotfix
  • 发行日期：2025-05-15

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fixed the error message that appeared while telling Sophie the truth If you experience an error on launch with “File “game/definitions.rpy”, line 180” - Please redownload the game
  • New content: story continuation after the date with Yui
  • New UI design: main menu, load\save menu, settings, new music credits, updated gallery, dialogue window, choice menu and love menu with girls points
  • New visual notifications for love\lewd points and other info
  • New section called “Other” for the gallery, and new wallpapers and arts in corresponding sections
  • Love menu now contains “events” that had place in your playthrough, but for old save not all previous events will be displayed, it’s not critical, but if you want to see all “events” listed there you’ll need to start new game
  • Save\load pages now remember your scroll position, just as gallery will remember what page you were on
  • Bug and other fixes

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 很纯很暧昧，这游戏玩下来很甜，尤其结衣甜得犯规，而且文风很舒服，男主人设也三观在线，没粗话，没damn，情商很高，总得来说，作者文笔很强，不尬，设定也好，目前在我这里排第四，虽然女主有种日漫番剧倒贴的既视感，嗯，没错，就是成人版的五等分的花嫁，但是我就好这一口，我玩完futa，ntl，女性堕落，再来一把这个，简直太带派了。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.03.30 02:00 0.7 Public Hotfix ：AI意译汉化补丁 ✅
2026.03.30 02:00 汉化补丁：小友境月订阅 ✅
2026.03.30 22:00 汉化补丁：集成选项mod ✅
2026.04.03 01:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 ✅
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-30
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Waifu Academy 二次元老婆学院
item.description:
Waifu Academy [v0.13.5] [Irphaeus]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Waifu Academy, you play as young man (with a name of your choice, of course), who wishes to seek revenge after many years of harrowing ordeals… The game features more than 30 characters, each of which is unique and has a (hopefully) believable background. Most of the game scenes take place at a fictional private high school called, ‘Sazaki Academy.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.13.5
  • 发行日期：2025-11-29

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fixed and updated the Gallery.
  • New optional Kayane look.
  • New place the Devil’s Kiss aka Tendo Club.
  • Added Karma choices following previous events.
  • Added ~3800 lines of dialogue and script.
  • Added 9 new scenes with
  • 300 3D renders. -Added 26 new animations scenes.
  • Added 3 new musics, and 12 sounds/FX.
  • Fixed many typos.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 真真正正的神作，作者特别有日式二次元的梗，男主智商在线，不尬。

2026.03.31 22:00 修复“liz”翻译错误（应为“伊丽莎白酱”而非“利兹”） ✅

落谦酱点评

item.title: A Mother's Love 母亲的爱
item.description:
A Mother’s Love [Part 1-16 Plus] [OrbOrigin]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Your girlfriend’s mother doesn’t like you - doesn’t appreciate you for anything. Most of all, she wants you to leave her daughter because you’re in the way of her education. Little did she know, you have an affection for the mother and as she grows desperate to get rid of you, You both settle down of an agreement. An agreement that could change your whole relationship.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Part 1-16 Plus
  • 发行日期：2025-12-24

Changelog

更新日志
  • Fix the variable where you massage Nicole’s foot if you offered in Day 28.
  • Fix the bug with calling Nicole by her real name
  • Edit the walkthrough regarding calling Nicole by her real name
  • Splash screen has been updated with a new Motherly-Care Tier name list.
  • The Chapter Selection has been updated with Part 16.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

item.title: Ripples 涟漪
item.description:
Ripples [v0.8.0 Public] [Jestur]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Ripples is a sci-fi visual novel that centers around an 18-year-old in his last year of high school. He reunites with his good friend Darci and sets off to school like any other day, but as the day goes on, he learns new information about his deceased father that has him questioning the truth about his death.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.8Public
  • 发行日期：2025-07-13

Changelog

更新日志
  • 2,216 New Images
  • 191 New Animations (40+ Minutes Total)
  • 6 New Gallery Scenes
  • 50+ New Music Tracks
  • 110+ New Sound Effects
  • 5 New Hidden Renders
  • Several Render Fixes
  • Several Code Fixes
  • Lots of Typos Fixed
  • New UI (Thanks, Pax)
  • New Main Menu
  • New Replay Gallery (Hints Now Added)
  • Fixed some older gallery scenes not playing the whole scene
  • And Other Small Things

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Subscribestar
  • Discord
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 目前来看，涟漪是最经得起推敲的视觉小说了，不愧是借鉴了德剧暗黑，虽然建模是i社的一代HS，但是却是这领域运用最强的。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.04.01 16:00 0.8Public AI意译汉化补丁；集成选项mod ✅
2026.04.01 16:00 小友境月订阅 ✅
2026.04.04 16:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作时间：2026-04-01
  • PS：应该是没有漏翻的句子，有可能部分句子的人名错翻了？有时候会，有时候不会，但是用其他引擎，跑出来的意译效果没V3的好，落谦实在没时间去逐句意译了，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Shattered Minds 破碎的心灵
item.description:
Shattered Minds [v0.25 Beta] [eXtasy Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Shattered Minds is an open-world game, in which you take control over the life of a college student.
  • Your normal life is thrown out of whack after you realize you have the power to control the minds of others.
  • You will use this power to make all your dreams, desires and wishes come true!
  • A world with countless quests, figures, plots and locations are waiting to be discovered and controlled by you!
  • Shattered Minds includes plenty of animations, a licensed soundtrack and atmospheric sound effects!
  • Be ready to experience a game full of sexy adventures!
  • All paired with a thrilling, mysterious yet humorous plot.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说

item.title: A.O.A. Academy AOA学院
item.description:
A.O.A. Academy [Ch.5 Gold] [TLGGAMES]

Overview

剧情概要
  • June 2020, the month after your father died. He was the only motivation for you to stay in the old town. Now.. You didn’t know where else to go or what else to do. Due to his bad heart, you decided to take care of him full time, causing you to drop out of high-school to focus on the farm.
Spoiler
  • There’s absolutely nothing else left for you here… Until one day, you found a letter from the A.O.A academy, claiming that you have been accepted into their academy. This surprised you, since you’ve never attempted to enroll in any academy. Not only that, this letter also contained the number of your old friend, Ashley. Determine to face your new future , you headed to the A.O.A Academy.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 5 Gold
  • 发行日期：2022-05-15

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Instagram

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏很可惜，半路夭折了，24年的时候跑过AI，只不过是gpt的，质量不如deepseek，所以前阵子又跑了一次AI，只是一直搁置吃灰，刚好昨天有水友推了，那么就制作一下补丁吧
  • 原游戏是没有CG回放的，补丁虽然集成了外置画廊，但是画廊只能看一半，一半放生了，甚至一半都没有，这我也没办法，直接打在本体，就得重新跑一次ai，太麻烦了，虽然这游戏已经寄了。
博文更新日志

2026.04.03 22:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 📢
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-31
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Companion of Darkness 黑暗伴侣
item.description:
Companion of Darkness [S2 Ch.12] [Berkili4]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 3 years after a tragic incident, you return to your hometown. Just before you reach your destination, you watch as two supernatural forces pit their strength against each other in a fight to the death.
  • It seems that you have been discovered and effortlessly overwhelmed, but instead of dying you wake up in your bed as if nothing had happened.
  • Was it all a dream?
  • Everyday life goes on whether you like it to or not. Not only do you feel like a stranger in your hometown, more and more unexplainable events are happening around you.
  • When the ones you care for are threatened, you must decide which boundaries you are willing to cross. And, if it is worth to give up humanity.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Season 2 - Chapter 12
  • 发行日期：2025-12-17

Changelog

更新日志
  • And again, Chapter 12 is by far the biggest chapter yet ( I never learn).

Developer（入正地址）

  • SubscribeStar
  • Discord
  • Patreon
  • itch.io
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 只要能接受的了前期的渲染，建模，动画，后期的细糠不会辜负你的坚持
  • 其实是不想添加月订阅的，但是这游戏好烦，好几个设定，都需要统一，而且AI遇到这种设定，还会出现幻觉，导致文本变得文邹邹的，还不能再次跑一次AI，只能人工修改，没辙，主要原因就是Primordial，Dark One，这两个单词，好家伙，AI检测到这两个单词，原初，太古，远古，黑暗，几千，几万年前，就开始出现幻觉，所以部分剧情也会变得文邹邹，当然，我现在没时间玩，有时间玩，我在把文风改回来，当然，这些只是少数的，只要上下文没这些单词，就不会出现文邹邹的。
博文更新日志
日期 更新详情 当前状态
2026.03.31 22:00 Season 2 - Chapter 12 AI意译汉化补丁；集成选项mod ✅
2026.03.31 22:00 Season 1 - Chapter 9 AI意译汉化补丁；集成选项mod ✅
2026.03.31 22:00 小友境月订阅 ✅
2026.04.31 22:00 汉化补丁：博文公开 ✅
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-28
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Steps of Debauchery 堕落之路
item.description:
Steps of Debauchery [Ep.5.0-patreon] [Fooxied]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Follow the steps of Riley, a girl who moves from a small town to the city to help her husband, Mike, pursue his dreams. While Mike is busy with his bar, Riley supports him wholeheartedly and often puts others’ well-being above her own. This leads her into unexpected situations, where she discovers more about her true self and deepest desires.
  • She explores her sexuality in college and unravels her fantasies, takes on the role of a waitress at the bar, engages in activities with an elderly neighbor, streams adventures with his grandson and that’s just the tip of the mountain. Riley’s world is opening wide in front of her, and she waits for you to explore it.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode5.0-patreon
  • 发行日期：2025-12-13

Changelog

更新日志
  • Join your beloved and charming heroine, Riley, on an epic tale of magic, love, and cookies. Meet your wonderful cast clad in new look, new themes, and new situations. Things will be fun, exciting, and of course… steamy.
  • With Mike’s sudden disappearance, Riley finds herself looking for answers in the ever-enchanting Christmas dreamscape. Join her on a very merry adventure!
  • Grab your blanket, a cup of something hot, and enjoy the show!

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Discord
  • Twitter

  • 可还行，女性堕落题材的，有些人，可能不喜欢，但是我就好这一口。

item.title: Game of Hearts 红心游戏
item.description:
Game of Hearts [Steam R1] [SparkHG]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The next successor war dawns on Earth. A seat at the high table, once governed by a powerful demon, went vacant for unknown reasons. With a chance at a position of control, other lesser demons roused from their respective places, each with an aspiration of reaching the apex of power
Spoiler
  • But you, an outsider, knew nothing about it. A rude awakening haunted your place in the form of an armed assailant, and you’d be dead if it wasn’t due to a man who called himself your father.
  • Thrown into a different life, you must gather power from gaining loyal followers;
  • (mainly)women beguiled by your irresistible demonic charm. Seduce and corrupt your way into a stable life.
  • And then… maybe, just maybe, you might rise to the top.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Steam R1
  • 发行日期：2025-12-18

item.title: Sinful Summer 夏日小故事
item.description:
Sinful Summer: A Tale of Forbidden Love [Ch.3.5] [Ruykiru]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Embark on an unforgettable journey with Erik and Lyna, two young twins entangled in a passionate web of desires. Set against the breathtaking backdrop of a private tropical island villa, their reunion after a year abroad sparks a fiery exploration of emotions that defy traditional boundaries.
  • As they tread the line between repressed feelings and mutual attraction, their bond deepens and the craving for the forbidden becomes impossible to ignore. With the arrival of their mother Helga on the horizon, will they succumb to temptation or resist the call of their primal urges? Discover the twists and turns of this compelling narrative through a kinetic visual novel where love, family, and desire intertwine in very interesting ways…
  • DISCLAIMER: THIS IS NOT A GAME, IT’S A VISUAL NOVEL WITHOUT CHOICES.
  • Think of it as a book, TV show or movie, but with lots of porn. Also this is NOT your usual incest story about a mindless poorly-written harem. It has a big focus on the taboo itself and making the family relationships mean something more than just a label. Expect very heavy incestuous dialogue here, without any stupid censorship patches. Also lesbian scenes and both male and female protags.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Race of Life 绝命竞速
item.description:
Race of Life [Act 2 Ep.4 Fix 4] [Underground Studio]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《Race of Life》是一部成人视觉小说。你扮演杰克·米勒（Jake Miller），一位离婚的教授，他因过去的错误失去了高薪工作和婚姻，开始从事教学工作。当悲剧降临时，杰克必须运用他的所有技能、智慧和冷酷无情来拯救他最爱的人。

item.title: Zenless Zeal Zones 绝区零同人
item.description:
Futa’s World of NTR [v1.5.1] [ScarletGames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The day Babmu opened the door to his own life, the city began to play a new tune. Gentle coincidences, bold conversations, and quiet support will turn the calculating Vaiz into someone ready to accept love in many faces.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.02
  • 发行日期：2026-02-08

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord
  • Boosty

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 之前一时兴起跑的AI，绝区人同人来着，没啥剧情，挺短的，但是可以看看女角色上垒。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-28
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: FreshWomen 新生也疯狂
item.description:

剧情概要
  • 《新生也疯狂》是一款由选择推动情节发展的成人向视觉小说游戏，聚焦于生活中最美好的点点滴滴。成为密涅瓦湾学院的新生，和美少女们谈情说爱，揭开事故的谜团。您的这趟旅程将充满欢笑和坎坷，以及海量的性爱内容。

item.title: Growing Things Up 金鸡独立
item.description:
Growing Things Up [S1 v1.04] [Kinkbr]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 一部关于欲望、信任以及我们甚至试图向自己隐瞒的秘密的成人视觉小说。在 South Lake，每一个选择都会揭示伤疤、无声的操纵以及那些让你更接近或更远离真实自我的道路。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Season 1 - 1.04
  • 发行日期：2026-03-20

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏是有官中的，设置里选普通话就行了，但是之前玩的时候，感觉一般，然后我就去跑了个ai，而且也制作了选项mod
  • 有需要的水友可以自行打补丁，PC和iOS直接丢到game文件夹即可，但是安卓呢？也能打补丁，只不过需要移动文件，其实就是外挂移植的安卓，在博客顺便找一篇这样的博文，下载主体apk就行了，例如老婆学院，康乃馨俱乐部，AI革命等等。
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE
  • Season 1 - 1.04版本的选项mod，过段时间再做，现在不是很有空，毕竟正在制作几个完结的游戏补丁。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-15
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: Boundaries of Morality 道德的边界
item.description:
Boundaries of Morality [v0.69c] [Novel]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Get ready for an exhilarating experience where every choice you make can either pave the way to success or drag your life into a spiral of intrigues and manipulations.
  • At the heart of the story is Emma, a young woman embarking on a new job in a major company. But she quickly realizes that the office walls hide not just career opportunities but also a tangled web of schemes and secrets she must skillfully navigate.
Spoiler
  • Your mission is to help Emma traverse this labyrinth of tough decisions. Lies, temptations, manipulations — or loyalty, honesty, and purity — the path you choose leads to unique outcomes. Boldness or caution? Ambition or moral principles? It’s up to you to shape her career and personal life.
  • Immerse yourself in a world where the choice between morality and ambition becomes a test of strength. “Boundaries of Morality” is a story where every decision matters. Your task is to find balance between career and personal relationships—whether by staying true to yourself or completely transforming. Are you ready to face the challenges of destiny and emerge victorious?

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: ToxiCity 毒性
item.description:
ToxiCity [v0.16.0] [ILSProductions]

Overview

剧情概要
  • It rolled in slowly. In a town in its off-season, no one noticed when the city streets grew empty. No one thought twice about it when people called in sick. And then, while at work, John and his coworker, Kallie, witness an unusual fog surrounding their office. Cellphone service stopped. Phone lines went dead. Almost immediately, they lost contact with the outside world. When they went out to investigate, the fog burned their exposed skin and made them sick. Stranded, they have to find out what’s happening and how they might be rescued.​

游戏信息

item.title: MILF Secrets 徐娘半老秘事
item.description:
MILF Secrets [v0.1] [Astaros 3D]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A new place. New people. Something feels off… but you can’t quite explain why. This v0.1 introduces the world, the tension, and the first steps into the story.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.1
  • 发行日期：2026-03-17

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Twitter
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 可爱表姐作者的新作，看着可还行。
博文更新日志
  • 2026.03.22 18:00
    • 更新0.1的AI意译汉化补丁
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-22
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

荤图

DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁）

Win（PC端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：GOFILE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：PIXELDRAIN
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁
  • 解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中
  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可
  1. 温馨提示：
  • 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒

  • 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！

Android（安卓端）

  1. 下载链接：
  • 英文原版：GOFILE
  • 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN
  • AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE
  • AI意译汉化补丁：PIXELDRAIN
  • 主体APK：GOFILE
  • 主体APK：PIXELDRAIN
  1. 安装步骤：
  • 下载英文原版、AI意译汉化补丁和主体APK
  • 安装APK文件
  • 启动游戏，放行所有权限
  • 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退
  • 然后解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将英文原版game文件夹中的所有文件及文件夹和汉化补丁rpa文件一起移动到以下路径： 
    1

    Documents/RenPy_Saves/com.luoqian.MilfSecrets/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。

item.title: Hail Dicktator 冰雹独裁者
item.description:
Hail Dicktator [v0.89.1] [Hachigames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Down on your luck, you suddenly receive a letter from an uncle you never knew you had. He offers you a job to manage his tropical island resort. You find it’s full of beautiful women and a strange culture of punishment and reward. But perhaps the island itself is even stranger than the people that inhabit it… Build friendships and fall in love with the girls. Punish or reward them. Follow their stories. Explore the secrets of the island, upgrade the hotel, build more facilities. Maybe one day, you will become the new ‘Dicktator’! ‘Hail Dicktator’ features fetishes of all kinds already available in the game, including anal, bondage, spanking, tickling and feet.
  • As of 0.75, there are over 1500 events, over 16k renders, and over 250 full animations in the game. Additionally, a lot of slideshow mini-animations. Full animations are currently mostly in the later game.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Unity
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: Sunset Rose 暮色玫瑰（阳光玫瑰）
item.description:
Sunset Rose [v0.1 Elite] [Lewdlab]

Overview

剧情概要
  • in the Story you play as a Male Protagonist, He’s a chill guy, mid-twenties, lives alone. No pets, no girlfriend, living that bachelor life. He works at a local fast food style restaurant with his colleague, Daniela. They also happen to be living in the same apartment complex. They are bickering all the time but at least it doesn’t get too boring at work. But one day, everything changes when life takes a bad turn for Daniela and our MC, is gonna be the only one she can rely on to help her. Her apartment burns down in mysterious circumstances and just as she asks MC to crash on his couch for a while, the smoking hot Catalina moves in next door - instantly sparking a connection with MC. Will he make the most of this situation?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Deliverance 峰回路转
item.description:
Deliverance [Final] [1Thousand]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Deliverance is a story of mystery, thrill and discovery. A choice-based adult visual novel allows you to explore the detective’s both sides. The hero, fighting to save his loved ones, or the villain willing to abandon all morality for power.

item.description:

剧情概要
  • Cybernetic Seduction 是一款充满性、幽默与动作的选择驱动型未来成人视觉小说。作为一名新手特工，你将在一个全新的世界中展开冒险，只有一个明确的目标：勾引女人。打动黑帮老大，策划抢劫行动，并揭开神秘组织的真相。

item.title: Origin Story 起源故事（嘿炮纠插队）
item.description:
Origin Story [S2 v0.9.3] [JDOR]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Taking place twenty years after the Metagen-92 virus – aka the “Superflu” – has swept the world and rendered many of its adult population superpowered or mutated, Origin Story follows MC (name customizable), a seemingly normal nineteen-year-old who in any other universe would be a popular and attractive prospect for most girls. But in this universe, his ability hasn’t manifested yet. Shunned by most of his meta-gifted peers, MC finds himself a hapless virgin on the lower rung of his school’s social ladder, with only a few misfit friends by his side.
Spoiler
  • Following the death of his parents when he was just a baby, his upbringing in the system was overseen and financially supported by their close friend Parker Samson, the affluent and influential co-owner of the lead organization behind Metagen research and development of the now ineffective Metagen Vaccine. Having recently moved in with the beautiful Parker, and her equally beautiful daughter Riley, MC finds the perpetual state of arousal that comes with the burden of his virginity even more challenging.
  • When MC is targeted and violently attacked for reasons unknown to him, The Sisterhood – a government-backed team of celebrity superheroines and sex icons - comes to his aid. While under their care, The Sisterhood immediately recognize his worth and hidden charms.
  • MC soon finds himself juggling his school life, his suddenly blossoming relationships with the women he keeps close, his curious involvement with The Sisterhood and one big secret that could determine whether this is the origin story of a hero, or a villain.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Reclaiming the Lost 寻回失落
item.description:
Reclaiming the Lost [v0.12] [Passion Portal]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《寻回失落》是一款由选择驱动的成人视觉小说，你将跟随一名男子，他发现自己的旧爱将他们的孩子送去领养。为了弥补过错，他开始寻找失散的孩子。途中，他遇到了一位神秘的女孩，二人共同揭开真相。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.12
  • 发行日期：2026-03-07

Changelog

更新日志
  • This update is packed with events for almost every main girl — Emily, Chloe, Grace, Evelyn, and even a character you haven’t seen in a long time.
  • Emily – 3 Events
  • A full working day with Emily
  • A scene at your place with Emily and Chloe
  • A surprise ending featuring a character who hasn’t appeared in a while Chloe – 2 Events
  • A second date for those following the “Mysterious Politician” route Grace – 1 Event
  • A rare opportunity to spend time with Grace Evelyn – 2 Events
  • The beautiful wife of your best friend returns And this time your friendship might be put to the test again…

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Subscribestar

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这次落谦移植了个安卓，也附上的AI意译汉化补丁，当然，看各位水友的需要，因为这游戏是有官中，不过也是AI测试版本，看了下，应该是gpt的，比某些所谓的精翻强，不过原文人名是显示英文的，看着有点别扭，所以我自己跑了一个ai。
博文更新日志
  • 2026.03.14 14:00
    • 更新0.12.0版本的官中及AI意译补丁
    • 汉化补丁集成选项mod。画廊mod。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-17
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: The Veil 帷幕
item.description:
The Veil [v0.3.6] [Mr.Shaxy]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You transfer to a university for your sophomore year to start life with a clean slate. A new city, new people, new - - opportunities—it seems like everything is falling into place perfectly.
  • But already in the first week, something starts to go wrong.
  • Strangers stare at you too intently.
  • Conversations overheard by chance, cut short when you approach.
  • Suspicious documents that shouldn’t exist.
  • This university has dark secrets. Some students know more than they let on. Teachers pretend not to notice anything. And those who ask too many questions… disappear.
  • Someone is watching you.
  • Someone is manipulating events.
  • Someone has already decided your fate.
  • Can you get to the bottom of the truth? And most importantly, will you still be alive when you find out?

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.3.6
  • 发行日期：2026-03-04

item.title: Agent17 特工17
item.description:
Agent17 [v0.26.10] [HEXATAIL]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You are an ordinary-looking pervert with average grades, blending into the background at school without anyone paying much attention to you. Occasionally, you may face bullying from troublemakers, possibly even being robbed or coerced into doing their bidding. However, one fateful day while heading home, you stumble upon a damaged phone. The phone initiated transformation in your life.
Spoiler: More

  • This phone has the power to solve all your problems. Contrary to popular belief, an unknown individual called Agent17 obeys the commands of whoever picks up the phone, allowing you to instruct her to carry out any task. Suddenly, your life takes a dramatic turn for the better. You triumph over the bullies who tormented you, and you exact revenge on the teachers and principals who held you in contempt.

  • The mundane school life that once held no interest for you begins to change as you start interacting with a multitude of talented and captivating individuals. As your connections deepen, you gradually uncover their hidden secrets. With the formidable abilities of Agent17 at your disposal, you also delve into their unknown mysteries. Moreover, you realize that your life is brimming with countless fascinating discoveries awaiting your exploration.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

item.title: Stuck in My Game 苟在3d区同人游戏开后宫
item.description:
Stuck in My Game [v0.9.0] [Niinko]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Being a game developer is no easy task, but finally,your game is ready to be released, and you’ll soon be able to…Oh no, an unfortunate accident has occurred.You are trapped inside a game – YOUR game.And after a closer look… Yes, it’s different, but why?Set out to uncover why, how, and who modified your game, and above all,how to escape from it…​

博文更新日志

    • 更新0.9.0版本的AI意译汉化补丁
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-16
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: New Family 新家庭
item.description:
New Family [v0.6.5] [King Peanut]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The story begins with the main character, who lost their parents at a young age, being taken in by a new family. This new family, though not related by blood, is a small, close-knit community that relies on one another. As the main character lives and grows with them, they share in each other’s lives and experiences. The unfolding relationships within this family and the events they encounter together form the central storyline​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.6.5
  • 发行日期：2026-02-27

Changelog

更新日志
  • Rena: The maximum Massage Level has been expanded to Level 6.
  • Yuno: A new feature has been added to the “Approach her” button in Yuno’s room during the morning. Once her Arousal is fully charged, you can meet her in front of her room at night.
  • Miho: A new NSFW scene with Miho has been added in her room at night.
  • Akari: When Akari’s Arousal is maxed out, a new menu option will appear on your bed at night. (Akari NSFW scene)

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 安卓的apk显示0.4.5版本是正常的，因为只是个载体而已，而且作者没用新版的renpy，所以没必要再次移植。

item.title: Contagion Crisis 传染危机
item.description:
Contagion Crisis [v0.6.0] [WeLoveMonsters]

Overview

剧情概要

  • Contagion Crisis is an adult monster survival-horror kinetic novel heavily influenced by games such as Resident Evil, Parasite Eve, and more.

  • In 2018, a contagion escapes into the city of Grimhaven, Washington, turning everything it touches into lust-fueled monsters. Sisters, Sarah and Ava, must traverse the city, doing their best to avoid the mutations as they attempt to reach sanctuary. Through their journey, the pair will seek the truth of the contagion’s outbreak; a task that will require them to unravel a web of lies that will change them both forever.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.6.0
  • 发行日期：2025-12-04

Changelog

更新日志
  • ~1000 renders
  • 33 animations
  • Additional ambience and sfx

Developer（入正地址）

  • Ko-fi
  • Itch.io
  • Subscribestar
  • Discord
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

item.title: Ms.Denvers 丹弗斯女士（毕加索女士）
item.description:
Ms.Denvers [v0.1.2.5] [Pop Toc]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Wanda Denvers is a 40-year-old single mother with a son and two daughters. She’s the principal of Middleton High School. This story focuses on her life after 5 years of divorce, as she battles with the task of having to take care of 3 people on her own. It’s now been so long since she had a love life she feels more lonely than ever before. How will she fill the pit of emptiness in her life? You decide.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

item.title: Realm Invader 领域入侵者
item.description:
Realm Invader [Ep.2 P2] [Invader Gary]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In this game, you follow a young soulless shell for you to self-insert into man who lives in a world very similar to yours. Recently, he’s been riddled with several mysterious ailments, including headaches, goosebumps, and an inexplicable sense of dread.
  • These symptoms were a warning, this man finds himself in the middle of a cataclysmic event, at least, it would seem so. Where cataclysms will typically lead to the destruction of a world, this one has led to a birth. The nature of his world has shifted around him. There are new species, an altered society, and magic.
  • He needs to learn about his new circumstances and what he can do with his new magical abilities. This man will slowly come to realize why he was sent to this world and walks a journey to unravel the mystery of his existence.
  • …
  • …
  • …
  • …
  • Oh, yeah, and he fucks a bunch of people on the way.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

  • 这游戏是俄文的，简直太烦了，我根本不懂俄文，修正人名，给我修麻了，一直在琳和凛这两个人名对线，而且ai跑俄文还会出现幻觉错翻，服啦，反正我是把遇到的错翻修正了，其他的没办法，我的建议是直接打画廊mod，看画廊就行了，太折磨人了，还有一点就是主体apk是用4.3版本的，但是不影响运行，我的安卓手机没有报错，我也懒得再移植一次了，虽然就几分钟的事情，但能偷懒就偷懒。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-03-06
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Futa's World of NTR 我是吕子乔
item.description:
Futa’s World of NTR [v1.5.1] [ScarletGames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • After ten long years of protecting her foster family from her little secret, a young futanari finally takes off her chastity belt upon entering high school, eager to explore her repressed degeneracy and satisfy all of her immoralities.
  • Surrounded by sluts and innocents alike, she finds herself in an ever so sweet paradox of non-ending depravity and ntr.
  • The plowing starts from Day 1!

item.title: Soulmate 灵魂伴侣
item.description:
Soulmate [Ep.4] [The Gentlemen]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The Mc (you) and his foster sister, who suffers from dysarthria and aphasia, go to university in the town of Langwi and work at the Langwi Hotel. Later, in Mc’s hotel room, he encounter a female ghost named Molly, who has lost her memory, and only Mc can see her…
  • What interesting events will unfold next? Let’s wait and see~~​

  • Step into a world where passion meets management in this NSFW anime style visual novel that blends immersive storytelling with interactive gameplay. In Kamogawa Island: My New Life at a Sex Resort, you’ll dive into a hedonistic paradise unlike any other—a floating luxury resort where your choices ignite a cascade of sensual adventures and personal growth.​

item.title: MILFs of Sunville 徐娘半老
item.description:
MILFs of Sunville [S2 v11.00 Extra] [L7team]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Sunville的MILFs是一款成人游戏，讲述一个年轻人被迫离开大城市的奢华生活，回到小镇Sunville的大学。这是一款VN沙盒游戏，充满了美丽的女孩、浪漫、道德选择、优质的图形和炙热的动画。

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Season 2 - 11.00 Extra
  • 发行日期：2026-01-19

Changelog

更新日志
  • The update contains ~2500 new images and many hot animations. Hot Investigation will be split into multiple updates since we have big plans for this story and will feature a ton of content.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 很经典的游戏，官中前面部分是人工汉化的，但是也就那样，毕竟几年前的翻译不成熟，而且第二季后面的汉化就是润色不到位的机翻了，怎么办呢？忍着吧，哈哈。
  • 当然，我自己是玩的ai版本，不过这游戏不是传统的tl，而是json格式的源码，有需要的水友，可以在博文底下留言，看到我就上传，为什么不直接上传呢？因为上传了，gofile一个星期内，没人下载就会失效，所以有需要再上传，桀桀桀。

item.title: My Cute Roommate 我的可爱表姐
item.description:
My Cute Roommate [v1.6.1 Ex Beta] [Astaros3D]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Your high school years are over, and now it’s time to think about the future. You need to pick a good college, find yourself a girlfriend, and start thinking about a job. That’s when your life changes; you’re diagnosed with a mysterious illness and there’s only one way to cure it.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：1.6.1 Extra Version Beta
  • 发行日期：2020-03-22

Changelog

更新日志
  • Added the ability to beat Dick at the end of the game.
  • Added translations.
  • Added scene replayer.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Discord
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏很经典，建模没有政治正确，虽然是物理眨眼补帧数的伪动态CG，但不得不说玩法很多，而且背景还是挺温馨的，背景音乐响起，梦回当年熬夜啃生肉的日子了，哈哈。
博文更新日志
  • 2026.01.31 04:30
    • 补链。
  • 2026.02.27 12:30
    • 添加画廊mod。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-27
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Mad Island 疯狂岛
item.description:
Mad Island [v0.5.8 Beta] [E-made+]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 您可以通过自由的游戏风格享受生存，例如制作、探险、建筑、采矿、耕种、钓鱼、捕捉动物和原住民、拷问、根据您的选择改变故事走向以及与BOSS战斗。游戏的目标是逃离这座小岛，但是否逃脱完全取决于您的选择！

item.description:
My Bimbo Dream [S2 v2.0.7] [MBD]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 一款围绕碧池化、堕落与扭曲恋情的重口味视觉小说。引导你那甜美的“房东”苏，踏上转变之路。可选择的路线包括：后宫、皮条客、或可选NTR。

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说

item.title: AIRevolution AI革命
item.description:
AIRevolution [v0.3.8] [Akaime]

Overview

剧情概要
  • AIRevolution is a Visual Novel Game, sci-fi bathed with a shiny layer of fantasy. The world is crowded with Artificial intelligences, most of them looking like humans, they even managed to have the same rights as humans do in a ’near’ future. Will you accept them as equals or.. choose another path? You better decide fast, there is an AI Revolution incomming..

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.3.8
  • 发行日期：2025-02-20

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 四个字总结，不玩白瞎。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-23
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

荤图

  • 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可

item.title: Domino Beach 多米诺海滩
item.description:
Domino Beach [Ep.3 Beta] [Mr Jet]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A young and ambitious man arrives in Domino Beach, the sunny city of his dreams, hoping to start a new life. But from the very beginning, nothing goes according to plan: he loses his job and then gets evicted from his apartment. By a twist of fate, he gets a chance to prove himself and join the team of beach lifeguards, with tryouts happening in a week. Will he be able to overcome this challenge, surrounded by so many temptations: beautiful girls, daredevil surfers, wild parties, and an ocean of alcohol?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Getting Intimate 亲密无间
item.description:
Getting Intimate [Ch.2 Part C] [MangoWorks]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A young man makes efforts to get into college and fulfill the promise he made many years ago. However, in the same year as the entrance exam, a sudden and tragic event leads him down a different path. Four years later, having lost everything, he receives the opportunity to rebuild his life. In this familiar yet new place, he will meet different people who will have an impact on his life while more than one secret awaits to be revealed.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Chapter 2 - Part C
  • 发行日期：2026-02-07

Changelog

更新日志
  • +1400 renders!
  • 26 animations (2 new scenes, 1200 frames in total)
  • Fresh music tracks!
  • The conclusion of Chapter 2…

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • SubscribeStar
  • Discord
  • Twitter
  • Itch.io

落谦酱便利贴

PS

  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-16
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: House of Hearts 红心之屋
item.description:
House of Hearts [Ep.2 P.1] [SparkHG]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The next successor war dawns on Earth. A seat at the high table, once governed by a powerful demon, went vacant for unknown reasons. With a chance at a position of control, other lesser demons roused from their respective places, each with an aspiration of reaching the apex of power
Spoiler
  • But you, an outsider, knew nothing about it. A rude awakening haunted your place in the form of an armed assailant, and you’d be dead if it wasn’t due to a man who called himself your father.
  • Thrown into a different life, you must gather power from gaining loyal followers;
  • (mainly)women beguiled by your irresistible demonic charm. Seduce and corrupt your way into a stable life.
  • And then… maybe, just maybe, you might rise to the top.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

  • As per usual, if you used modded saves and scripts, the mods will have to be adapted to the public release before your saves can be used again. Please consult the mod author for an update before proceeding.
  • Developer Notes updated. Please read it if you want to know about the sequel.

item.title: Projekt: Passion 激情星动
item.description:
Projekt: Passion [S3 v0.16] [Classy Lemon]

Overview

剧情概要
  • A futuristic adult visual novel filled with sex, comedy, drama, violence, and more sex. Go on a fun-filled space adventure and develop relationships with a diverse cast of characters with their own personalities and motivations.

游戏信息

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio

  • 下载英文原版、AI意译汉化补丁和主体APK
  • 安装APK文件
  • 启动游戏，放行所有权限
  • 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退
  • 然后解压英文原版压缩包文件
  • 将英文原版game文件夹中的所有文件及文件夹和汉化补丁rpa文件一起移动到以下路径： 
    1

    Documents/RenPy_Saves/com.luoqian.ProjektPassion/game
  • 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可
  • PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。
  1. 温馨提示：

item.title: Romantic Escapades 极品采花郎
item.description:
Romantic Escapades [v2.1.0] [Salamander Interactive]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《极品采花郎》是一款中国古风恋爱模拟游戏。玩家透过情节的发展，在游戏中逐步与各色美女培养感情，进而渐渐发展出愈来愈深入的亲密关系。过程中，可进行采集、制作、建造、种植、锻炼等行为推进游戏进程；更有特色玩法“調教”可与美女互动。

  • 这是一个拥有丰富情色要素的模拟经营类游戏。 主角是一个黑社会成员，目前面临晋升考验，在30天内赚够1000万日元。 玩家将在白天管理经营按摩店，夜晚走上街头拉客宣传。当然你也可以选择在夜晚时间放松一下和其他女主角约会。 游戏的主要游玩形式为模拟经营以及用弹珠战斗。

item.title: Self-defense Dojo Secret NTR Lesson 极道无赖:护身术道场篇
item.description:
Self-defense Dojo Secret NTR Lesson [v1.9.10 + DLC] [WAKUWAKU]

Overview

剧情概要
  • This is a simulation-style erotic game with humorous elements incorporated. The protagonist, Kota Morimura, gets into trouble after sleeping with his yakuza girlfriend, prompting him to go into hiding for a while. During this period, he teaches self-defense techniques to girls at a judo dojo and starts reaching out to female students with his desires.
  • As a player, you will take on the role of a self-defense coach, teaching judo techniques to your students. During this time, you may encounter some dojo challenges. If your strength and skills are insufficient, you will need to earn money through simulated part-time mini-games to improve your basic attributes. This will better enable you to guide your students.​

item.title: Phoenixes 凤凰
item.description:
Phoenixes [v16.0.0] [NoMeme]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The story of PHOENIXES takes place in a world where both magic and science are well developed, a world where the superhero is really a thing. You, a wanderer in the junction between light and shadow, are now dragged into the cusp of the fight between heroes and villains. The city is falling apart and justice is being corrupted, you will have to take the responsibility and … … … …
  • Nah, that sounds boring, why don’t you just enjoy an easy life in this urban fantasy world and get all the hot strong beauties in your harem no matter whether they are heroes or villains? That solves the fight too, right?​

item.title: Fleeting Memories 流连忆往昔
item.description:
Fleeting Memories [v0.4.6] [Lyrical Artistry]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Get ready for a romantic noir journey, as you take on the role of a private detective living with your childhood sweetheart, aka best friend. One day, when your newest neighbor comes to you with a personal request, you’re quickly thrust into your next case. The past and present unravels as you try to crack the unsolved mystery of her sister’s death. Not to mention, the possibility of a new romance as well. Will you keep things strictly professional? Or is there room for some new love in your life? What about your childhood friend? Follow your instincts and witness where this thrilling journey takes you.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Update 4 Final (0.4.6)
  • 发行日期：2026-02-10

Changelog

更新日志
  • 5500+ new words of content
  • 100+ static renders
  • 7 new animations
  • New music and sound effects
  • Translated in Korean, Chinese and Russian

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这次更新作者添加了简体中文，不过是ai，但是总比没有好，流连忆往昔这名字挺有诗意的，建模还行吧，勉强能看，渲染就有点，总觉得有一层雾，但是动态CG顶，肉眼可见，作者花了很大的心思，到时候我有空再跑一下ai吧，现在能玩就将就着玩吧，总比没有好，哈哈。

item.title: Revenge Paradise 复仇天堂
item.description:
Revenge Paradise [v1.2.0] [OINARI CAT]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Upon your grandfather’s sudden departure from this world you inherit a certain island resort, and it turns out to be a secret organization……!
  • Girls with “special circumstances” are brought here from all over the world.
  • Having become the “executioner” of this resort, you will receive various tasks, and dish out punishment. Whether you can subjugate the girls through your discipline is up to you!
  • Receive a task, chase down the target, catch her and show the girl her place! Until you have completed the punishment objective, you can enjoy her body as you please.
  • The more tasks you complete, the more costume and sex positions will be unlocked.

item.title: Secret Flasher Sereka 塞雷卡1
item.description:
Secret Flasher Sereka [V1.3] [SheableSoft]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Experience the greatest dilemma known to humans: wanting to experience the thrill of exposing yourself in extreme ways, but the more extreme it is,the more likely you are to be caught. Seleka starts out as an amateur exhibitionist, but will hopefully become a legendary flasher who has been seen by all.
  • Complete missions to unlock new maps, learn slutty actions, and earn points to buy daring accessories. The more daring you are exposing yourself, the more points you will earn.
  • But be careful! If you are caught, you will forfeit all the points you have earned in your current session! Experience the risk a real exhibitionist faces(minus the jail time and sex offender registry)!

item.title: Summer Crush 夏日恋情
item.description:
Summer Crush [Ep.8 v1.0.3] [Wet n’ Juicy Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • 《夏日恋情》是一部面向成年人的视觉小说。故事情节将完全取决于你做出的选择。你将扮演一个青年，一个已经计划好他的乏味成年生活的青年。现在，他正在等待夏天的结尾。可能会出现什么转机呢？

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 8 - 1.03
  • 发行日期：2026-02-07

Changelog

更新日志
  • The eighth and final episode of Summer Crush is now available. New scenes, animations, achievements, and music await you. Well, business as usual!
  • I realize I’ve been dragging my feet. In May 2025, when I sat down to develop the final episode, I thought I’d have it all finished in time for the game’s third anniversary, November 25th. And now, on November 24th, I’m looking at the game’s progress and realizing there’s still a ton of work to do: the animations aren’t ready, some renders aren’t finished, the music is missing, and there’s no sign of any translations into other languages. This post is partly for myself – if you’re the only one responsible for everything, don’t set deadlines! You’ll never make it…
  • Nevertheless, I apologize. The game was supposed to be finished sooner, but I couldn’t do it before. But now it’s done!
  • I hope you enjoy it. Thank you for devoting your precious time to my little game.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Steam
  • Discord

item.title: Cross Realms 跨界
item.description:
Cross Realms [v0.4Public] [DuskDuck]

Overview

剧情概要
  • On the first day of your college life, you and a group of friends are sucked into a vortex. When you wake up, you realize you’re in a foreign place - this is not Earth. As you explore this new world, you discover it’s a Qi cultivation realm, where power determines everything.
Spoiler

  • There are nine Realms, each controlled by a dominant race: Humans, Demons, Deities, Spiritual Beasts, and more. Each Realm has a “spring” - a flow of Qi energy harvested from the Void, the space between Realms. Because of these springs, peace between the Realms is fragile and rarely lasts long. You arrive during the longest period of peace ever known, but how long will this so-called ‘peace’ really last?

  • As your journey continues, you uncover more secrets about these Realms. Someone in the shadows has been plotting and orchestrating your arrival. Will you be able to stand up for yourself in a world where many see you as nothing more than a useless ant?

  • The answer are yours to find.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Eternum 永恒世界
item.description:
Eternum [v0.9.5 Public] [Caribdis]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You’re moving with your best friend to the city of Kredon, home to some of the best schools and universities in the country, to continue your studies. However, in Kredon, there’s only one thing everyone talks about: ETERNUM—the virtual, hyper-reality MMORPG game released a few years ago that revolutionized the world of technology.
Spoiler
  • With a neural implant that recreates the five senses, it becomes impossible to distinguish between the game and the real world. Thousands of servers form the network of Eternum: from colorful, magic-filled fantasy worlds to foggy sci-fi cities, no world is beyond reach. Nevertheless, looking beyond the surface, there’s a darker side to this pretty facade: black markets, torture, rape, illegal content trafficking, unlawful assemblies, data theft… Eternum follows the rules of no man. For some reason, governments turn a blind eye to this; there’s no regulation and no control. Some say it’s because the game is highly addictive, some say it’s because the market moves millions of dollars daily, some say those in power have been bribed, and others say… there’s something else going on. And you? What’s your role in this story? Well… That’s up to you now.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.9.5 Public
  • 发行日期：2026-01-21

Changelog

更新日志
  • 2050+ new images
  • 90+ new animations
  • 20900+ new lines of code
  • 42+ new music tracks
  • 100+ new sound effects
  • Several render and code fixes

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • SubscribeStar

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 安卓是用作者的apk文件，作者集成在压缩包里，还是和之前一样的移动文件，当然也可以用官网itch的汉化，我就懒得搬运了，就上传我自己玩的汉化上来。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-09
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: My Hentai Fantasy 我的hentai幻想
item.description:
My Hentai Fantasy [v0.14.0] [Naughty Capy]

Overview

剧情概要
  • You just wake up without remembering anything, apparently, you’re living a dream life, but why does everything seem so odd? You are about to go to university and your father is one of the richest men alive, but the fact that you don’t remember anything after waking up makes you very uneasy, so you try to find answers.
  • But who knows, maybe the answers you’re looking for are not worth it… Or are they? I guess it’s better if you find out for yourself.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：日系风

版本信息

  • 发行日期：2026-02-06

Changelog

更新日志
  • FINALLY, THE END OF TATSUMAKI’S ROUTE. This update includes events that you may never see unless you pick the right choices. It also has more renders and more animations than the first part, so you may need to play it twice to experience everything and unlock both endings. Just remember: the ending you choose will heavily affect the main story.

item.title: Desert Stalker 沙漠追猎者
item.description:
Desert Stalker [v0.20.0 Beta] [Zetan]

Overview

游戏概述
  • Desert Stalker puts you in control of a seasoned antiquity scavenger, a man whose main objective is finding rare objects in the ruins of civilization. When you uncover an artifact capable of not only informing the past but also shaping the future, everything changes. Make major decisions about how you interact with the world around you, enter into erotic relationships, and live with the consequences of either dominating or saving both the people and landscape of post-apocalyptic Egypt.​

item.title: Confined and Horny 禁足中的欲火
item.description:
Confined and Horny [v0.25.3] [Tukann]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Confined and Horny is an immersive sandbox adult game with compelling story elements. Fully animated sex scenes, hours of sandbox fun with lewdness around every corner, and a lot more content to come.
  • As you’re moving to an apartment share in a new city, the government decides to confine every citizen to their home. You’re now stuck with your new roommates. Develop your relationships, unravel their stories… and get intimate with them.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：HTML
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.25.3
  • 发行日期：2026-02-03

Changelog

更新日志
  • New Emily scenes
  • New Olivia scenes
  • New Mia scenes
  • New secret scene (thieving consequences)
  • Added New Years wallpaper
  • Updated main menu backgrounds
  • You can now adjust the background music and SFX volume with sliders
  • New UI scaling setting, “AUTO” option sets it based on your screen size (100% for 1080p, 125% for 2K and 150% for 4K)
  • Moved menu to the left of the main panel on bigger screens so it’s easier to access
  • Redesigned the save/load menu to avoid confusion between the load and save options
  • Change to the “Check her out” mechanic: now the main character’s lust can only raise once per time frame
  • Zoom feature redone from scratch, now you should be able to zoom and drag images and videos, with multiple zoom levels. You should also be able to drag zoomed images and videos on mobile.
  • Redesigned menus
  • Added indicator for chores left to do for the week in the top bar
  • Fixed Olivia handjob stat not being incremented when doing photo shoots with her
  • Fixed a conflict between Olivia’s seance events and other events
  • Fixed a missing frame in an Emily/Olivia animation
  • Fixed the repeat version of Emily and Olivia’s photoshoot not resulting in money gain
  • Typo fixes
  • Bug fixes
  • 0.25.1: Fixed a bug causing a conflict with Olivia’s state and showing an empty entry for her in the notebook
  • 0.25.2: Fixed a UI issue on Olivia’s contacts scene
  • 0.25.2: Fixed character stats not increasing in some of the new scenes
  • 0.25.2: Hide the fullscreen setting in contexts where it can’t work
  • 0.25.2: iOS: Restored old behavior with bgm/sfx toggles, a platform restriction prevents controlling audio volume with sliders
  • 0.25.2: iOS: Removed the fullscreen setting, it can’t work because of a platform restriction
  • 0.25.2: iOS: Prevented the default overscroll behavior which makes navigation bothersome
  • 0.25.2: iOS: Prevented double-tap to zoom which can interfere with minigames Confined Lover Tier and above:
  • New Olivia bonus scene
  • 0.25.3: Added “New!” marker to emphacize which bonus scene was added in this updated Confined Admirer Tier and above:
  • One new lewd camera picture to collect from Emily

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • SubscribeStar
  • Itch.io
  • Discord
  • Twitter

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 这游戏挺好玩的，上垒CG比特工好，爆赞！

item.title: The Seven Realms 七界
item.description:
The Seven Realms [R3 v1.03] [SeptCloudGames]

Overview

剧情概要
  • For four hundred years, Atlas (name can be changed) has tried to maintain a semblance of peace throughout the realm. Since the death of their Queen and a great apathy seized their king, it fell to Atlas, the prince of the vampires, to restore order. So when he smells an unfamiliar scent that should not have been amongst a party of humans, he goes to investigate and meets Leyala.
  • Leyala seems to be hiding something, and by trying to undercover what, Atlas starts a chain of events that will cause them to venture across The Seven Realms.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py

item.title: Summer Heat 夏日猎艳记
item.description:
Summer Heat [v0.6.1] [Naughty Fox Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • Experience the ups and downs of summer class! Meet girls, earn their trust (or break their hearts) and practice your photography skill in the process. No matter what you choose, you’ll feel the heat.​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.6.1
  • 发行日期：2024-09-01

Changelog

更新日志
  • 1800 new renders
  • 15 new animations
  • 37 new unlockable gallery images
  • 4 new unlockable replay scenes
  • 20,000 words
  • 100 new SFX, songs and ambiences

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Itch.io
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 个人感觉这游戏比新生也疯狂好玩，无论是建模还是剧情，仅次于我的大学生活，但是就更新有点慢，本来是要等作者更新，再出这个游戏的汉化的，可惜一眼望不到头，行吧，这游戏代码逻辑…怎么说呢？有点反人类，作者是舒服了，我去找文本源码可就惨咯，难怪这游戏没人搞…
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-02-16
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

游戏预览图

素图

  • 英文原版：GOFILE

item.title: The Arson Betrayal 纵火背叛
item.description:
The Arson Betrayal [v0.8.0] [Crispy Chicken Productions]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The Arson Betrayal puts you in the shoes of Leo Somerfort (or any name you want). With only an apartment in Ablesmith City and enough cash to pay the bills for a few months, you’ve been working at a café, hoping to save enough money to be able to go to college. But one fateful encounter plunges you into the middle of a conspiracy filled with lies, betrayal, and violence.
  • “Watch your back. Trust no one.”
  • “Now it begins.”
  • Synopsis
剧情概要
  • The Arson Betrayal is first and foremost a Harem game, centered around a story-focused action-thriller visual novel.
  • Players are given the opportunity to choose which girls they wish to pursue a relationship with (or even none at all), as they spiral down towards the center of a deadly conspiracy.
  • As the story goes, you’ll discover the girls’ different kinks and be given the chance to determine how your relationship with them progresses, romantically or otherwise.
  • A majority of your choices and conversations with characters throughout the story are remembered and may affect the story as you go forward.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：0.8.0 - Act III - Chapter 3
  • 发行日期：2025-12-14

Changelog

更新日志
  • Contains Act II - Chapter 3.
  • 1,863 new images, 20 animations.
  • A revamped gallery.
  • Additional code to support the codex (to be added soon).
  • Several bug fixes, typo corrections, and improvements.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • Twitter

  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Clown Squad 哥谭市
item.description:
Clown Squad [Prologue] [NoGlory]

Overview

剧情概要
  • The world loves lies — as long as theyâre funny, pretty, or heroic. You were never meant to be honest. You were meant to be a clown. A performer. A distraction. A joke. But thereâs a problem. You physically cannot lie. Jokes are built on exaggeration, nonsense, and falsehood. Comedy is a craft of bending the truth. And you? Youâre forced to tell it exactly as it is. Youâre cynical to your core. You think too sharply. You work harder than anyone around you. Your mind is a razor. And because of it — people treat you worse than someone who has nothing at all. This is a story about a man forced to be funny in a world that hates the truth. And now, for the first time, you get to decide: Will you break or will you break the world?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Prologue
  • 发行日期：2025-12-09

Changelog

更新日志
  • Initial Release

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord
  • Subscribestar

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 星宿作者的新坑，已统一主要角色的人名，次要角色没办法，可以放心吃，不过我跑完ai没玩，哈哈，就三个动画，先养着！
博文更新日志
  • 2026.01.18 14:30
    • 补链
  • 2026.02.01 19:30
    • 补链
关于汉化补丁

  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2025-12-10
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Heart Problems 心之困扰
item.description:
Heart Problems [v0.10] [Xenorav]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In HeartProblems you play as a guy who, after losing his parents, moves in with his uncle Davie. As the years pass and he reaches sexual maturity, he begins to realize that he lives with three incredibly beautiful women…​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：v0.10
  • 发行日期：2025-07-29

Changelog

更新日志
  • New chapter added: Chapter 10.
  • Gallery updated with all new scenes from Chapter 10. - Unlock button included
  • Improved visual quality in the compressed version. After testing, the best resolution for image quality vs file size is 1286x724.
  • New visual filters added. You can now adjust saturation, brightness, contrast, and tint (cooler/bluer or warmer/orange tones) from - the Preferences menu.
  • New “Auto” speed option available in Chapter 10 animations. (Plays animations at randomized intervals for a more natural effect.)
  • Image transitions can no longer be skipped by spamming clicks. (You can still use Ctrl to skip normally.)
  • Fixed a bug that caused animations to play too fast on monitors with high refresh rates. (Currently fixed for Chapter 10 - animations—coming to the rest soon.)
  • New memory usage options added to improve performance:Low ≈ 2GB RAMMedium ≈ 4GB RAMHigh ≈ 6GB RAM (This helps to store more images in - ram to avoid lag in transitions and between animation transitions.)
  • New role system for Amelie. For example, if you set her role as “mom” a line like “Hi [relation] Amelie” will appear as just “Hi, - Amelie.” If you chose “Aunt,” it would show “Hi, Aunt Amelie”.
  • New “Default” option added in settings-audio, which resets all audio levels to the developer’s recommended values.
  • The Android version now finally has a custom app icon (no more default Ren’Py icon).

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 心之困扰，网上流传是叫情感问题，心脏问题，为什么落谦这里是心之困扰，其实这部作品就是围绕姨妈的展开，作者一直不上垒，其实也正常，毕竟姨妈是有夫之妇。
  • 如果跟自己的侄子发生关系…但是已经是两个孩子的母亲，大的女儿已经有自己的一半岁数了，也到了绝经的年龄，也打上人老珠黄buff，导致姨妈和姨父感情不合，男主作为第三者，也就是boyfriend？目前关系还没崩。
  • 这部小说最大的卖点就是姨妈，姨妈一上垒就可以完结，就可以弃坑了，当然，作者肯定不会，至少要拖个一两年，我本来是想等更新新版本再写博文，但是迟迟不更，去年8月跑完ai就一直躺着，索性就上传一下吧。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-01-31
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: Inanna Revenge 伊南娜的复仇
item.description:
Inanna Revenge [Ep.3] [AtemX Games]

Overview

剧情概要
  • In Inanna Revenge, you play as Arthur (customizable name), a 21-year-old young man living a dull and uneventful life with his stepsister—until one fateful day, that life comes to an abrupt end. But death doesn’t mark the end of your journey. A goddess named Ea offers you a chance to be reincarnated into a new world, one brimming with magic and adventure. What seems like the beginning of a fairy tale quickly reveals a harsher reality. To carve out your place in this new world, you’ll need to fight, face countless challenges, make tough decisions, and build meaningful relationships. Will you rise to the occasion, or be consumed by the trials ahead?
Spoiler
  • In Inanna Revenge, you won’t just control your character’s relationships with others, but also shape his personal development. Numerous choices allow you to develop your character into someone compassionate or ruthless, depending on your preferences. These choices will influence how your character interacts with others in various situations. Moreover, you can also affect the mentality of some of your love interests, deciding whether to pursue a romantic relationship with them or guide them into becoming submissive, obedient companions.
  • The game is a Visual Novel with a strong RPG feel. A turn-based combat system will be used to resolve certain conflicts, and your characters will gain levels, allowing them to allocate stat points and learn new skills. You’ll also find puzzles to solve later in the game.

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Honey Select 2
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：亚洲风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 3
  • 发行日期：2026-01-17

Changelog

更新日志

-New content - Episode 3:

    • 1491+ new images
    • 118 new animations
    • 21,250+ new lines of code
    • New music tracks
    • New sound effects
  • Previous content:
    • Added Russian and Simplified Chinese translations for Episodes 1 and 2.
    • Fixed various typos in the French and English texts.
    • It will no longer be possible to access Regina’s ‘revenge’ route if your MC is compassionate and has not shown a desire for revenge in - their previous choices.
    • The king’s letter received during Episode 2 will now appear in your inventory after reading it.
    • All AI-generated images (16) presenting the lore at the start of Episode 1 have been replaced with standard renders.
  • Bug fixes:
    • Fixed an issue with Sylvia’s dialogue when leaving the blacksmith in Cascus, where relationship points were not being properly awarded.
    • Fixed a bug that incorrectly saved one of the choices related to Manon during the bath scene under certain conditions.
    • The "NTS Content" option will no longer appear as both enabled and disabled if you turn it off in one save and then load another save with the option enabled.
  • User Interface:
    • The achievements screen is now accessible during gameplay without needing to return to the main menu.
    • The text corresponding to the percentage of mining and agricultural workers in the ducal codex has been swapped to correctly match the slider used to adjust this parameter.
    • Redesigned the deduction screen after the Deerwood investigation to make it more intuitive.
    • Visual overhaul of the language selection screen at first launch and in the options menu.
    • Visual redesign of the inventory screen.
    • Added a "Translation" section to the "About" screen with links to the translators’ social networks.
    • Added a notification indicating that attribute or skill points are available on character portraits in the relationships screen.
  • Combat system:
    • Added tabs to categorize the MC’s spells by element during combat.
    • Multi-target spells (such as Sylvia’s Lightning Bolt) can now be cancelled, even after selecting an initial target.
    • Level cap increased to 16
    • Level 16 skills have been added
    • Added new mechanics tied to these skills
    • Added new consumable items
  • Miscellaneous:
    • Ren’Py has been updated to version 8.4.1, fixing some bugs and improving performance.
    • When choosing your name, letters beyond the first are no longer forced to lowercase.
    • When choosing Sylvia’s name, names containing "ea" are no longer forbidden.
    • Experience gained by your partners through Inanna’s blessing is now based on your level rather than theirs.
    • Refactored certain parts of the code to better support translations requiring font changes (using non-Latin characters).
    • Files in the TL folder will no longer be archived, making it easier for Russian- and Chinese-speaking players to update translations.

Developer（入正地址）

  • Itch.io
  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 落谦不懂法语，所以我只统一了主要角色的人名。
博文更新日志
  • 2026.02.01 18:30
    • 补链
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2026-01-17
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。
落谦酱点评

item.title: New Horizon 新天域
item.description:
New Horizon [v0.4 Early] [KawaiiSukebe]

Overview

剧情概要
  • What does a man have left after his father has gone missing, and his ex-girlfriend relentlessly broke up with him for seemingly no reason at all? An empty heart that lives through a monotonous everyday life. “Meeting you changed my world.” The fateful encounter got our story’s MC, Hirase Tatsuya, involved in something that could shake the whole country, or even the world. Come and unravel the secrets behind the MC’s missing father and all the unexpected bittersweet encounters with the girls.​

游戏信息

  • 1 scene with side character Maki.
  • Added option to turn off KS commentary in-game.

Overview

剧情概要

    • 补链接。
  • 2026.02.01 03:00
    • 补链接。
关于汉化补丁
  • AI模型：DeepSeek-V3
  • 翻译作者：落谦
  • 制作日期：2025-12-20
  • PS：可能会出现极少量的人名翻译误差。例如我指定AI将Rachel统一翻译为瑞秋，AI只会在检测到完全一致的英文单词时进行替换。如果原文中存在拼写错误、缩写格式，或Rachel’s这类词形变化（如名词的所有格、复数用法等），就可能被误译成瑞穗，但仍会保持音译形式，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。
  • 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。

item.title: The Office 办公室潜规则
item.description:
The Office [Episode 4 v0.1 Beta Fixed] [Damaged Coda]

Overview

剧情概要
  • This game is about Gail, a 27-year-old woman working in a financial services company called HI&F - Huge Investment and Finances. She is a street-smart lady who came from humble beginnings. She started as a receptionist after years of hard work and some harmless flirting. (So she thought.) After winning the fight against a colleague for her dream job. Gail gets promoted to the Regional Sales Manager position. That was the easy part, with potential enemies around every corner planning her downfall. What will she do to thrive and survive to reach her ultimate goal as CEO of HI&F?​

游戏信息

游戏类型

  • 游戏玩法：视觉小说
  • 建模引擎：Daz Studio
  • 运行引擎：Ren’Py
  • 游戏画风：欧美风

版本信息

  • 当前版本：Episode 4 v0.1 Beta Fixed
  • 发行日期：2025-09-24

Changelog

更新日志
  • N/A

Developer（入正地址）

  • Patreon
  • Discord

落谦酱便利贴

PS
  • 其实这游戏很久之前就跑好ai了，但是一直没时间修专有名词，如果你喜欢仙子的修行，琼明神女录，仙子，老奴来的题材的话，那么这部作品非常适合，反正我是挺中意这种女性堕落的题材，盖比一看就是这种料，如果做纯爱，那就是对这个建模的侮辱，那么这部作品，就很平平无奇了。
